title: schraderia dracocephaloides
intro: Schraderia dracocephaloides is a plant species, commonly known as the dragon-head, which belongs to the family Gentianaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Schraderia dracocephaloides is often used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
